name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient tracking causes missed discounts. We automate weekly procurement spend analysis reports instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to track procurement spend efficiently

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to track procurement spend efficiently
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient tracking causes missed discounts. We automate weekly procurement spend analysis reports instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of procurement spend using spreadsheets

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient tracking causes missed discounts. We automate weekly procurement spend analysis reports instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
